message:
Merge PR #1993: fix(test): prevent test suite from leaking Dolt databases into production

Introduces testutil.RequireDoltServer(t) and isolated Dolt test port to prevent
test suites from leaking databases into production server.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1993
Author: Xexr

Co-authored-by: gastown/crew/gandalf <xexr@xexr.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+package polecat
+
+import (
+	"os"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/steveyegge/gastown/internal/testutil"
+)
+
+func TestMain(m *testing.M) {
+	code := m.Run()
+	testutil.CleanupDoltServer()
+	os.Exit(code)
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
